user_query: I'm planning to attend a football match next week. Can you give me the predictions for the matches in the next 48 hours? It would be helpful if you could also provide the bookie odds. Furthermore, I'm interested in the performance statistics for the past predictions in the last 14 days.

TaskList.description: Fetch predictions for football matches in the next 48 hours.
Retrieve bookie odds for the upcoming matches.
Collect performance statistics for past predictions from the last 14 days.
